D8 AnthropologyL2 UnderstandReference

Islamic Green — Flags and Sacred Symbolism

Green is associated with the Prophet Muhammad's cloak and paradise (Qur'an 76:21); the colour appears on Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Iran, Bangladesh, and Mauritania flags

Hadith mentions the Prophet's preference for green cloaks. The Qur'an describes paradise's inhabitants wearing "garments of fine green silk and brocade." The Fatimid Caliphate institutionalised green as Islam's dynastic colour in the 10th century. Modern Muslim-majority states adopted green in their flags as a confessional marker.

Pick a national flag to inspect its green-and-iconography composition.
